data.name: Fetish Room 18+
data.detailed_description:
You've just stepped into the role of a master at Fetish Room. Here, different girls come to you seeking to explore their deepest desires. Earn trust and master your skills to become the most revered master around.



Your guests are diverse, each bringing their unique cravings to your door. Learn what makes each of them tick so you can expertly fulfill their fantasies!



Be careful, though! Perfecting your craft might lead to unexpected results. Will you maintain your reputation as a disciplined master, or will the experiences transform you?



And yes, it turns out we even have visitors from the most exotic of backgrounds!

Features:

  • A diverse cast of seductive and alluring characters with unique personalities and desires.
  • Animated 3D Sexual Experience: Your choices allow you to unlock the most magical sexual scenes with each of the characters.
  • Stunning graphics and immersive sound effects that will make you feel like you're really there.
  • Exciting and erotic mini-games to keep things interesting and engaging.

data.short_description: Dive into Fetish Room 18+, a 3D adult simulation game where you command a realm of forbidden pleasures. As the master, your guidance can ignite the deepest desires. What path will you choose?
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 繁體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel i5-8400
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1660s
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel i5-10600
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce RTX 3060
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
